#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct Header {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
};

Header peek_header_without_reading(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    // Remove constness because the adaptor requires non-const, but we promise not to modify.
    std::vector<uint8_t>& non_const_buffer = const_cast<std::vector<uint8_t>&>(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(non_const_buffer);

    Header header;
    // Use copy to peek at the header without advancing the read cursor.
    adaptor.copy(&header, sizeof(header));

    // We can also use read_ptr to get the pointer to the current read position and verify?
    // But the function returns the header, so we are done.

    return header;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_then_conditionally_read(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    std::vector<uint8_t>& non_const_buffer = const_cast<std::vector<uint8_t>&>(buffer);

    uint8_t first_byte;
    adaptor.copy(&first_byte, 1);

        // Read the entire buffer
        std::vector<uint8_t> result(buffer.size());
        adaptor.read(result.data(), result.size());
        return result;
    } else {
        return {};
    }
}

        std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
            std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
            hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
            hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

            // Write message_id

            stream.write(big_message_id);

            // Write the count of data_values
            uint32_t data_count = packet.data_values.size();
            uint32_t big_data_count = hexi::endian::native_to_big(data_count);
            stream.write(big_data_count);

            // Write the data_values vector
            std::vector<uint16_t> big_data_values;

            stream.write_container(big_data_values);

            // Write the checksum
            uint32_t big_checksum = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
            stream.write(big_checksum);

            return buffer;
        }
